message:
feat(packages): implement Next.js hydration-safe bootstrap adapter and expand React SDK surface

packages/next/src/index.ts:
- Add NextClientBootstrapAdapter: a full lifecycle manager for
  asupersync runtimes in client-rendered Next.js boundaries. Tracks
  bootstrap phases (server_rendered → hydrating → hydrated →
  runtime_ready), detects render environment (SSR, hydrated, server
  component, edge), handles soft/hard/popstate navigation events,
  manages scope generation invalidation on route changes, and
  provides automatic recovery (retry_runtime_init,
  reset_to_hydrating) on failures.
- Add rich type surface: NextBootstrapPhase, NextRenderEnvironment,
  NextNavigationType, NextBootstrapRecoveryAction,
  NextBootstrapSnapshot, NextBootstrapLogEvent, and
  NextClientBootstrapOptions.
- Adapter emits structured log events via onLogEvent callback for
  observability integration.

packages/react/src/index.ts:
- Expand React adapter with additional hook and component exports
  for tighter integration with the browser runtime lifecycle.

package.json:
- Update workspace package dependency declarations to reflect the
  expanded SDK surface.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -12,7 +12,10 @@
     "build:dev": "pnpm run build:wasm:dev && pnpm run build:packages",
     "clean": "bash scripts/clean_packages.sh",
     "typecheck": "pnpm -r run typecheck",
-    "validate": "bash scripts/validate_package_build.sh"
+    "validate": "bash scripts/validate_package_build.sh",
+    "validate:next-consumer": "bash scripts/validate_next_turbopack_consumer.sh",
+    "validate:vite-consumer": "bash scripts/validate_vite_vanilla_consumer.sh",
+    "validate:webpack-consumer": "bash scripts/validate_webpack_consumer.sh"
